morning.name: Wake up
morning.desc: Wake up gently before sunrise to align with Vata energy.

morning.name: Oral Hygiene
morning.desc: Tongue scraping and oil pulling (Sesame oil) to remove toxins.

morning.name: Warm Water
morning.desc: Drink a glass of warm water to stimulate bowel movement.

morning.name: Abhyanga
morning.desc: Self-massage with warm sesame oil to ground Vata.

morning.name: Gentle Exercise
morning.desc: Yoga or slow walking. Avoid excessive exertion.

evening.name: Warm Dinner
evening.desc: Light, warm, and cooked meal. Avoid cold foods.

evening.name: Relaxation
evening.desc: Read, listen to soft music, or journal. No screens.

evening.name: Warm Milk
evening.desc: Cup of warm milk with nutmeg to aid sleep.

evening.name: Sleep
evening.desc: Early to bed to balance Vata restlessness.

morning.name: Wake up
morning.desc: Wake up in the cool early morning hours.

morning.name: Oral Hygiene
morning.desc: Tongue scraping and oil pulling (Coconut oil) for cooling.

morning.name: Exercise
morning.desc: Swimming or yoga in a cool environment.

morning.name: Abhyanga
morning.desc: Self-massage with cooling coconut or sunflower oil.

morning.name: Meditation
morning.desc: Focus on compassion and cooling the mind.

evening.name: Balanced Dinner
evening.desc: Moderate meal, not too spicy or sour.

evening.name: Moon Walk
evening.desc: A short walk in the moonlight is very cooling for Pitta.

evening.name: Cooling Tea
evening.desc: Fennel or peppermint tea to soothe digestion.

evening.name: Sleep
evening.desc: Rest before the Pitta peak at midnight.

morning.name: Wake up
morning.desc: Wake up before sunrise (Brahma Muhurta) to avoid sluggishness.

morning.name: Oral Hygiene
morning.desc: Tongue scraping and dry brushing (Garshana) to stimulate.

morning.name: Hot Water
morning.desc: Hot water with ginger and honey to clear mucus.

morning.name: Vigorous Exercise
morning.desc: Intense yoga, running, or cardio to move stagnant energy.

morning.name: Pranayama
morning.desc: Bhastrika or Kapalabhati to energize the system.

morning.name: Meditation
morning.desc: Focus on movement and internal light.

evening.name: Light Dinner
evening.desc: Very light, warm, and spicy meal. No dairy.

evening.name: Active Evening
evening.desc: Engage in social or mental activity to stay sharp.

evening.name: Digestive Tea
evening.desc: Cinnamon or clove tea for warmth.

evening.name: Sleep
evening.desc: Lighter sleep is better for Kapha types.
